content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 22, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 22, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Milady integration, performing extensive dependency management across the framework, and preparing for future architectural updates. The team addressed critical regressions in LifeOps and continued to harden the codebase through security and version updates across Rust, Python, and TypeScript environments.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Milady Integration and LifeOps Stabilization**
*   Repaired Milady CI regressions by restoring website blocker and Telegram export functionality.
*   Refactored subpath imports to package-root imports and resolved method collisions in the LifeOps signal client ([#7008](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7008)).

**Dependency Management and Security Hardening**
*   Updated a wide range of dependencies across the ecosystem, including Rust crates (`prost`, `sha2`, `getrandom`, `cbc`, `uuid`), Python benchmarks (`torch`, `transformers`, `opencv-python`, `matplotlib`, `gymnasium`, `tqdm`, `pandas`), and TypeScript packages (`@xterm/addon-fit`, `@stwd/sdk`, `@orca-so/whirlpools-sdk`, `three`, `typescript`, `tsup`).
*   Applied security patches to `python-dotenv` and `tqdm` ([#7005](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7005), [#7012](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7012)).
*   Updated Docker configurations for the Supabase Postgres database ([#7010](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7010)).

**Testing and Infrastructure**
*   Updated `vitest` to v3.2.4 to support improved testing workflows ([#6997](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6997)).
*   Performed bulk updates to the `cargo` group across 19 directories to maintain environment consistency ([#7037](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7037)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7041](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7041): Bump cargo group across 15 directories.
*   [#7040](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7040): Bump cargo group across 12 directories.
*   [#7032](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7032): Introduce local inference hub, provider switcher, and agent local probes.
*   [#7027](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7027): Update rust crate cipher to 0.5 (autoclosed).
*   [#7025](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7025): Update rust crate aes to 0.9 (autoclosed).
*   [#7022](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7022): Update dependency tqdm to ~=4.67.3 (autoclosed).
*   [#7020](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7020): 2.x/v3 clean up.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were closed during this period.*

## NEW ISSUES

**Telegram Integration**
*   [#7009](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7009): Telegram read receipts require optimization to fetch by message IDs, avoiding inefficient nested lookups following recent fixes.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues met the criteria of having more than 3 comments.*
